# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php

$page = $_GET['page'] ?? 'home';

$page = trim($page);
$page = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\/]/', '', $page);
$page = str_replace(['..', '\\'], '', $page);

if ($page === '' || $page === '/') {
    $page = 'home';
}

$templatesDir = __DIR__ . '/templates';
$templateFile = rtrim($templatesDir, DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR) . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . $page . '.php';

if (is_file($templateFile) && strpos(realpath($templateFile), realpath($templatesDir)) === 0) {
    include $templateFile;
} else {
    http_response_code(404);
    $notFoundFile = $templatesDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . '404.php';
    if (is_file($notFoundFile)) {
        include $notFoundFile;
    } else {
        echo '404 Page Not Found';
    }
}
